name: Activity Points
title: Activity Points
text: Certain actions done during the Preparation Phase cost <red>Activity Points</> to perform.{br}The maximum number of Activity Points available per month is based on {v:LordName}'s <red>CON</>.

name: Critical Hits
title: Critical Hits
text: Units do not automatically perform critical hits in battle. They must learn a skill that grants guaranteed critical hits like <red>Critical</> or <red>Wrath</>.

name: Follow-Up
title: Follow-Up Attacks
text: Units do not automatically perform follow-up attacks in battle. They must learn the <red>Pursuit</> skill from a <red>Skill Scroll</> or equip a weapon that grants the <red>Pursuit</> skill to do so.

name: LightSword
title: Light Swordfighters
text: Includes Myrmidons, Swordmasters, Thieves, Rogues, and Assassins.

name: Vendor
title: Vendor
text:
The vendor sells items that can change <red>base stats</> and <red>growth rates</>. They sell five items per month and restock with different items every month.
Items are used immediately by the person who bought them.

name: Armory
title: Armory
text:
The armory sells <red>Skill Scrolls</> that teach different skills to a unit. They sell five scrolls per month and restock with different scrolls every month.
Skill Scrolls are used immediately by the person who bought them.

name: Skills
title: Skills
text: A unit can learn as many skills as they want during the Preparation Phase, but they may only equip <red>five</> skills at a time. Skills can be swapped out at any time by selecting <red>Set Skills</> at the castle.

name: Fishing
title: Fishing
text:
Fishing at the Fishing Hole yields money from the fish you caught. You also have a chance of randomly catching something that is usually stocked in the Armory or Vendor.
Items like this will be used right away when caught. This activity costs 1 AP.

name: Barracks
title: Barracks
text:
Both {v:LordName} and {v:JagenName} can raise their weapon experience and gain EXP at the barracks. {v:LordName} can gain 1, 2 or 4 WEXP at a time. {v:JagenName} can gain 3, 6, or 12 WEXP. Both gain 20 EXP each.
WEXP gain is doubled if they are of a different class than their base class and are using a weapon their current class can wield. This activity costs 1 AP.

name: Anna
title: Anna
text: Anna stops by at the end of every season to sell her wares. She sells things that the other shops don't. Items are used immediately by the person who bought them.

name: Arena
title: Arena
text:
{v:LordName} and {v:JagenName} can fight in the arena to earn <red>EXP, Weapon EXP, and gold</>. Units <red>do not die</> when defeated. Payout is dependent on the level difference between both fighters.
This activity costs 2 AP. AP is spent <red>only when a fight begins</>.

name: Watchtower
title: Watchtower
text: The soldiers at the watchtower give helpful information about the land of Chronos and its surrounding areas. They'll have new info to talk about each month.

name: Reclassing
title: Re-Classy Siblings
text:
Six of the Re-Classy Siblings appear on the map every month. Three of them can change {v:LordName}'s class and the other three can change {v:JagenName}'s class.
Any class chosen will be part of that unit's re-classing options at the end of the year.

name: Mining
title: Mining
text: You can mine for various gems which get immediately exchanged for a lot of gold. There is a higher chance of <red>not</> getting anything than there is of finding a gem. This activity costs 1 AP.
